title: Monthly Active Listeners and Growth

landmines.name: count-star-inflation
landmines.kills: COUNT(*) per month counts duplicate retry events and repeat listens by the same person, inflating the active-listener metric; the metric is COUNT(DISTINCT user_id).

landmines.name: first-month-growth-not-null
landmines.kills: The earliest month has no prior month, so month-over-month growth is undefined (NULL); reporting 0.0 there, or dropping the row via an inner self-join, is wrong.

notes: Month is bucketed from played_at (string slice), never from the non-chronological play_id. Duplicate events and out-of-order timestamps do not change COUNT(DISTINCT user_id).
